parameters.content:
PHASE 2 ONLY

This workflow classifies, routes, normalizes, QA-checks, writes Markdown to the vault, and commits to master.

Required env vars:
- DEEPSEEK_API_KEY
- VAULT_PATH
- GITHUB_REPO_URL

Do not add ChromaDB, RAG, Open WebUI, autonomous agents, vector databases, memory systems, or semantic search to this workflow.

nodes.name: Code - Route Human Review To Inbox
Execute Command - Git Add Commit Push Master

main.node: Code - Route Human Review To Inbox
Execute Command - Git Add Commit Push Master

meta.description: Importable Phase 2 structured ingestion workflow. Uses DeepSeek through OpenAI-compatible HTTP requests and writes Markdown to the local vault.
